cvarlist.name: _record
cvarlist.description: Record a demo incrementally.

cvarlist.name: key_findbinding
cvarlist.description: Find key bound to specified command string.

cvarlist.name: key_listboundkeys
cvarlist.description: List bound keys with bindings.

cvarlist.name: kick
cvarlist.description: Kick a player by name.

cvarlist.name: kickid
cvarlist.description: Kick a player by userid or uniqueid, with a message.

cvarlist.name: kickid_hltv
cvarlist.description: Kick a player by userid or uniqueid, with a message.

cvarlist.name: kill
cvarlist.description: Kills the player with generic damage

cvarlist.name: killvector
cvarlist.description: Kills a player applying force. Usage: killvector <player> <x value> <y value> <z value>

cvarlist.name: option_duck_method
cvarlist.description: Input toggle control

cvarlist.name: option_speed_method
cvarlist.description: Input toggle control

cvarlist.name: quit
cvarlist.description: Quit the game

cvarlist.description: Inspect background map

cvarlist.description: Main menu background movie

cvarlist.name: ui_party_msg_sound_enabled
cvarlist.description: When enabled, lobby messages will play a short sound

cvarlist.name: ui_setting_advertiseforhire_auto
cvarlist.description: Whether users will automatically advertise for invites (0: off; 1: last; 2: auto)

cvarlist.name: ui_setting_advertiseforhire_auto_last
cvarlist.description: Which game mode users last used to advertise for invites

cvarlist.name: ui_steam_overlay_notification_position
cvarlist.description: Steam overlay notification position

cvarlist.name: ui_steam_overlay_notification_position_horz
cvarlist.description: Steam overlay notification position horizontal offset

cvarlist.name: ui_steam_overlay_notification_position_vert
cvarlist.description: Steam overlay notification position vertical offset

cvarlist.name: unbind
cvarlist.description: Unbind a key.

cvarlist.name: unbindall
cvarlist.description: Unbind all keys.

cvarlist.name: unpause
cvarlist.description: Clear the pause state of the server.

cvarlist.name: vconsole_rcon_server_details
cvarlist.description: when non-empty allows for easy vconsole connection to the dedicated server.

cvarlist.name: view_punch_decay
cvarlist.description: Decay factor exponent for view punch

cvarlist.description: Viewmodel FOV

cvarlist.name: viewmodel_offset_x
cvarlist.description: viewmodel_offset_x

cvarlist.name: viewmodel_offset_y
cvarlist.description: viewmodel_offset_y

cvarlist.name: viewmodel_offset_z
cvarlist.description: viewmodel_offset_z

cvarlist.name: viewmodel_presetpos
cvarlist.description: 1:'Desktop', 2:'Classic'

cvarlist.name: violence_ablood
cvarlist.description: Draw alien blood

cvarlist.name: violence_agibs
cvarlist.description: Show alien gib entities

cvarlist.name: violence_hblood
cvarlist.description: Draw human blood

cvarlist.name: violence_hgibs
cvarlist.description: Show human gib entities

cvarlist.name: vmix_input
cvarlist.description: Set an input mix value

cvarlist.name: vmix_output
cvarlist.description: Dump main graph control output values

cvarlist.name: voice_always_sample_mic
cvarlist.description: When enabled, open the voip audio input stream when the application launches.

cvarlist.name: voice_device_override
cvarlist.description: Default device used for voice capture.

cvarlist.name: voice_input_stallout
cvarlist.description: Time before we consider a mic stalled out and need to reset it.

cvarlist.name: voice_modenable
cvarlist.description: Enable/disable voice in this mod.

cvarlist.name: voice_modenable_toggle
cvarlist.description: Toggle the voice_modenable convar.

cvarlist.name: voice_threshold
cvarlist.description: decibel threshold for how loud the talker's input signal is before we think they are talking.

cvarlist.name: voice_toggle_open_mic
cvarlist.description: Toggles between open-mic and push-to-talk

cvarlist.name: voice_vox
cvarlist.description: Voice chat uses a vox-style always on

cvarlist.name: volume
cvarlist.description: Sound volume

cvarlist.name: weapon_accuracy_forcespread
cvarlist.description: Force spread to the specified value.

cvarlist.name: weapon_accuracy_nospread
cvarlist.description: Disable weapon inaccuracy spread

cvarlist.name: weapon_accuracy_reset_on_deploy
cvarlist.description: On deploy, forcibly reset weapon accuracy to zero.

cvarlist.name: weapon_accuracy_stack_boost_limit
cvarlist.description: Apply ladder inaccuracy to players boosted by a stack of this many (or more) players

cvarlist.name: weapon_air_spread_scale
cvarlist.description: Scale factor for jumping inaccuracy, set to 0 to make jumping accuracy equal to standing

cvarlist.name: weapon_auto_cleanup_time
cvarlist.description: If set to non-zero, weapons will delete themselves after the specified time (in seconds) if no players are near.

cvarlist.name: weapon_debug_spread_show
cvarlist.description: Enables display of weapon accuracy; 1: show accuracy box, 3: show accuracy with dynamic crosshair

cvarlist.name: weapon_max_before_cleanup
cvarlist.description: If set to non-zero, will remove the oldest dropped weapon to maintain the specified number of dropped weapons in the world.

cvarlist.name: weapon_reticle_knife_show
cvarlist.description: When enabled will show knife reticle on clients. Used for game modes requiring target id display when holding a knife.

cvarlist.name: weapon_sound_falloff_multiplier
cvarlist.description: Scaling for falloff of weapon firing sounds

cvarlist.name: workshop_annotation_submit
cvarlist.description: Submit annotation to workshop. To update an existing submission add its ID number from the workshop URL as a second argument.

cvarlist.name: writekeybindings
cvarlist.description: Saves current key bindings to disk.

cvarlist.name: zoom_sensitivity_ratio
cvarlist.description: Additional mouse sensitivity scale factor applied when FOV is zoomed in.
